summary: Role 2 direct MCP parity review completed. P0-04 plan requires revision because docs demand exact single-name direct client proof, but current client_mcp_direct_status is a needs_recheck placeholder with no Codex or Claude verified tool evidence.
decisions: Return REVISE_REQUIRED for P0-04 until real Codex and Claude direct MCP canary artifacts can set client_mcp_direct_status to verified.
Configured MCP blocks, synthetic server starts, hook preflight, and CLI fallback must remain insufficient proof for direct MCP parity.
next_steps: Implement real client proof ingestion for Codex and Claude exact single-name tool discovery and invocation.
Add negative tests proving config-only, synthetic, stale, and incomplete proofs do not verify P0-04.
Wire verified direct MCP status into health and goal gates with observable proof links.
